protein_name: F-actin cross-linking protein which is thought to anchor actin to a variety of intracellular structures. This is a bundling protein. Belongs to the alpha-actinin family. Expressed only in a subset of type 2 skeletal muscle fibers. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
